rule_metadata.name: Contains_DDE_Protocol
rule_metadata.author: Nick Beede
rule_metadata.description: Detect Dynamic Data Exchange protocol in doc/docx

rules.rule_text:
rule Contains_DDE_Protocol
{
	meta:
		author = "Nick Beede"
		description = "Detect Dynamic Data Exchange protocol in doc/docx"
		reference = "https://sensepost.com/blog/2017/macro-less-code-exec-in-msword/"
		date = "2017-10-19"
		filetype = "Office documents"

	strings:
		$doc = {D0 CF 11 E0 A1 B1 1A E1}
		$s1 = { 13 64 64 65 61 75 74 6F 20 }
		$s2 = { 13 64 64 65 20 }
		$s3 = "dde" nocase
		$s4 = "ddeauto" nocase

	condition:
		($doc at 0 ) and 2 of ( $s1 , $s2 , $s3 , $s4 )
}
